facebook.caption:
7,513 reviews. 4.8 stars. On a pizza place in Phu Quoc.

The Home Pizza Trần Hưng Đạo is not a fluke. Thin crust, solid toppings, cold beer, and a bill that keeps you under $30 for two. Right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in Dương Đông, easy to find, always busy for a reason.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Hands pulling a fresh pizza at The Home Pizza Trần Hưng Đạo. Over 7,500 people rated this place 4.8 stars. Watch why the table next to you already ordered two rounds.
